name: Hawk's Golf Performance Studio
about: Hawk's Golf Performance Studio is a high-performance indoor training facility that blends cutting-edge technology with expert coaching and custom club fittings. Located in Ankeny, Iowa, the studio provides a championship-level experience for serious golfers through its use of Trackman and Foresight Sports technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis. The studio operates as a private, member-only environment, offering exclusive access to elite simulators and personalized coaching programs, including a specialized junior development program by referral only. The focus is on data-driven improvement, with services including custom Sub70 club fittings and personalized coaching sessions designed to elevate a golfer's performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to elite Trackman and Foresight Sports simulators for data-driven analysis
Custom club fittings with precision-engineered Sub70 clubs and Hanna Putters
Personalized coaching from a PGA Associate with a focus on measurable improvement
Private indoor bays dedicated to serious, uninterrupted training

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor for elite swing and ball flight analysis
Premium photometric camera launch monitor for precision launch monitoring

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the studio specializes in custom club fittings with precision-engineered Sub70 clubs and Hanna Putters, offering professional fitting services to tailor equipment to your unique swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services, and the studio appears to focus on high-performance training without public amenities like a kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a training studio focused on practice and coaching rather than public play, there is no set time for playing 18 holes. The experience is tailored to individual training sessions and improvement drills.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the studio offers an 'Elite Junior Development & Golf Lessons' program, though it is referral-only and designed to help young golfers develop fundamentals and competitive skills with expert mentorship.
